Documents Required

Anlage_D 

Anlage_F 

Declaration of Entry and Transit
visa_types.visa_fees:
[aut > lka > en > Table:Student > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subjected to change.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- In Sri Lanka, there is a service charge of 14,620.00 LKR + Department of Immigration and Emigration approval fee of 3,000.00 LKR (including Taxes) per application over and above the visa fees and all payments can be made by cash or card only.
- In Maldives, there is a service charge of 2148 MVR (including Taxes) per application over and above the visa fees.
- VFS charges (service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash or transfer only.
visa_types.processing_time:
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Student visas(more than 90days) are
                                                                        given
                                                                        to
                                                                        bona
                                                                        fide
                                                                        students to pursue regular studies
                                                                        at
                                                                        recognized
                                                                        institutions in Austria. The visa is
                                                                        multiple
                                                                        entries
                                                                        and
                                                                        valid for the period of study as
                                                                        approved by the educational
                                                                        institution
                                                                        in
                                                                        Austria.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Student visas(more than 90days) are
                                                                        given
                                                                        to
                                                                        bona
                                                                        fide
                                                                        students to pursue regular studies
                                                                        at
                                                                        recognized
                                                                        institutions in Austria. The visa is
                                                                        multiple
                                                                        entries
                                                                        and
                                                                        valid for the period of study as
                                                                        approved by the educational
                                                                        institution
                                                                        in
                                                                        Austria.

## Visa Fees

[aut > lka > en > Table:Student > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subjected to change.
- All the fees are non-refundable.
- In Sri Lanka, there is a service charge of 14,620.00 LKR + Department of Immigration and Emigration approval fee of 3,000.00 LKR (including Taxes) per application over and above the visa fees and all payments can be made by cash or card only.
- In Maldives, there is a service charge of 2148 MVR (including Taxes) per application over and above the visa fees.
- VFS charges (service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash or transfer only.

## Documents Required
Documents Required

Anlage_D 

Anlage_F 

Declaration of Entry and Transit

## Photo Specifications

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 1]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 2]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 3]

[aut > npl > en > Table:Business Visa > Photo Specifications 4]

## Processing Time
Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
Visa D Antragsformular 

As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form.If the applicant is unable to come for the submission, an immediate blood relative can come on behalf of the applicant. 

Declaration and Undertaking 

As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on declaration and undertaking.

Usually, processing time for visa applications is 15 working days (starting from the time when the Embassy or Consulate received the application, not including the transportation time), counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably when further scrutiny of the application is required, for example, when an applicant must come to an interview or submit additional documentation requested by the Embassy or Consulate. During certain times of the year, the processing time can be longer due to the high volume of applications. It is recommended to submit your visa application at least two weeks prior to date of travel date and if possible, even earlier ahead of the holiday period. 
Please note that the application processing time and decisions on visa applications are the sole prerogative of the Embassy or Consulate. VFS Global has no role to play in these areas of the application process.

## Download Form
## Download  Form

## 
Schengen Visa Application Form

Sample Form

As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on application form. Representative or travel agent must bring signed application form at the time of submission. 

Declaration and Undertaking 

As per instruction received from the Austrian Embassy applicant needs to sign on declaration and undertaking. Representative or travel agent must bring signed declaration and undertaking at the time of submission. 
  
                                                                  
Letter of Gurantee

Disclaimer

 Consent Form 

Declaration of entry and transit
